title: Deputy placement switch
description: Added a button to enable/disable the function of placing blocks with the assistant
body:
Have you ever had a deputy who brought a torch into a mine and wanted to use dynamic lighting to illuminate it, but easily inserted the torch everywhere? This mod can help you。
The mod added a button to enable/disable the function of placing blocks with the assistant.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a9c0b2545d1d67c7d985f5487f20800b055d885.png)
